track1_memory_construction.reason: Caption memory has no native object-level inventory. ReMEmbR MemoryItem (remembr/memory/memory.py:5-9) stores only caption/time/position/theta with no object field, so there is no native source of object labels + 3D positions to export as an object table.

track2_object_location.reason: No deterministic native object-location query API over caption memory. TextMemory/MilvusMemory.memory_to_string (remembr/memory/text_memory.py:40, remembr/memory/milvus_memory.py:231) return caption+pose+time strings, not object-level locations. The only answerer, NonAgent.query (remembr/agents/non_agent.py:40-91), is an LLM over caption context and is excluded from fixed-API support by design.

track3_scanrefer.reason: No referring-expression resolver. Caption memory cannot ground a ScanRefer utterance to a target object id/bbox.

track4_openeqa.reason: No method-native QA/retrieval fixed API in caption memory. NonAgent.query is a no-retrieval LLM caption-context answerer; ReMEmbR's native QA path is the agentic ReMEmbRAgent (Track 4), not this control.
